interaction_phrase: a Berlin team led by theoretical physicist Prof. Dr. Jens Eisert of
occurrence_sentence: Now a Berlin team led by theoretical physicist Prof. Dr. Jens Eisert of Freie Universität Berlin and HZB has shown that a certain class of such problems can actually be solved better and much faster with quantum computers than with conventional methods.
